## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX with candidate Jessica Shulsinger](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jessica has extensive experience in AI-driven content creation, particularly with Adidas and Hypotenuse AI](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly growing, managing multiple high-profile clients with AI-powered content generation](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [The role involves project management, editing, client interaction, and providing feedback to the engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [GrowthX is navigating challenges of rapid growth and implementing a new internal content platform](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Company Structure

  - [Technical Managing Editor role combines project management and content editing](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Reports to Andi Bailey, who leads customer operations](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Works within client-focused pods, managing 3-5 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Coordinates with content managers, directors, and account strategists](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Opportunity to influence product development based on delivery experiences](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)

### Jessica's Relevant Experience

  - [9 years as Managing Editor at Thread, a copywriting agency](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Managed Adidas.com account, creating product descriptions and landing page content](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Worked closely with Hypotenuse AI to implement AI-driven content creation for Adidas](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Experienced in AI training, prompt engineering, and managing accuracy in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Familiar with balancing multiple clients and prioritizing workloads](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

### GrowthX's Current Situation and Challenges

  - [Rapid growth: signed \~20 new clients and hired \~30 people in a short period](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Transitioning from "get it done any way" approach to structured processes](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
  - [Recently launched internal platform (6 weeks old) to standardize workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Balancing client deliverables with platform adoption and feedback collection](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

### AI and Content Creation at GrowthX

  - [Uses templated workflows with multiple inputs (company context, persona info, brand voice)](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Focuses on both accuracy and longer-form content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Exploring emerging SEO concepts like Google's Search Generative Experience (SGE)](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Aims to be at the cutting edge of AI-driven content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)

### Client Management and Workflow

  - [Managing editors handle 3-5 accounts with 1-3 content managers per account](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Content production varies from 5-7 articles/week to 100 refreshed articles/day](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Weekly client meetings, usually led by directors with managing editor support](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Use of Airtable for content management and Slack for client communication](https://fathom.video/share/xcketEgx_2FJG2CgfxXEEaj8uBxb9d96?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)

## Next Steps

  - Continue discussions about the role and potential fit
  - Explore how Jessica's experience with AI-driven content can benefit GrowthX
  - Consider strategies for balancing rapid growth with structured processes
  - Discuss potential contributions to GrowthX's evolving AI content platform
